name: Malaysia
avoid: Northeast monsoon Nov-Jan on east coast
stopoverNote: Kuala Lumpur (KLIA) is an AirAsia hub — excellent for cheap SE Asia connections.

cities.name: Kuala Lumpur
cities.notes: Petronas Towers, Batu Caves, Jalan Alor food street and rooftop bars

cities.name: Penang
cities.notes: George Town street art, Peranakan food and Clan Jetties over the sea

cities.name: Langkawi
cities.notes: Duty-free island with rainforest cable car, mangroves and powder beaches

cities.name: Malacca
cities.notes: UNESCO heritage town with Dutch Stadthuys, Christ Church and Jonker Street

cities.name: Kota Kinabalu
cities.notes: Gateway to Mt Kinabalu climb and Borneo orangutan wildlife

cities.name: Cameron Highlands
cities.notes: Cool hill station with tea plantations, strawberry farms and jungle treks
